Spell, Area, Persistent, Curse
Item /197
Leap Attack
Casts the skill and leaps up to the target spot to pummel the ground, dealing 228% Weapon Attack Damage to enemies within a certain area.
The skill grants the following buff upon consuming Demolisher Charge: Hitting enemies will increase the skill's Damage and Area.
Leap Attack:
Deals 228% Weapon Attack Damage.
This skill gains Demolisher Charge once every 4s.
This skill grants the following buff upon consuming Demolisher Charge: Gains a buff once for each enemy hit, up to 20 time(s).
The buff lasts 2s.
+20% damage to the skill per bonus gained
+10% Skill Area to the skill per bonus gained
-40% additional Attack Speed for this skill
75% of the bonuses for Movement Speed is also applied to the additional Attack Speed of the skill, up to +60% additional Attack Speed
Ice Shot
Casts the skill and fires 1 Ice Lance forward, dealing 313% Weapon Attack Damage on hit.
The Ice Lance explodes behind the enemy on hit, dealing 157% Weapon Attack Damage.
All of the skill's Physical Damage will be converted to Cold Damage.
Icy Lances:
Deals 313% Weapon Attack Damage.
The skill fires 1 Projectile in its base state.
Explosion:
Deals 157% Weapon Attack Damage.
Converts 100% of the skill's Physical Damage to Cold Damage
Inflicts Frostbite when this skill deals Hit Cold Damage
Hammer of Ash
Casts the skill and pummels the ground in front, dealing 369% Weapon Attack Damage on hit.
When pummeling, generates 3 auto-tracing Ember Projectiles, dealing 369% Weapon Attack Damage on hit.
When the skill consumes Demolisher Charge, Embers cause explosion on hit, dealing 369% Weapon Attack Damage.
Demolisher Charge additionally increases the skill's damage.
All of the skill's Physical Damage will be converted to Fire Damage.
Pummel:
Deals 369% Weapon Attack Damage.
Ember Projectile:
Deals 369% Weapon Attack Damage.
The skill fires 1 Projectile in its base state.
Projectile Quantity of this skill +2
Projectiles fired by this skill cannot Penetrate, Jump, or Return
Explosion:
Deals 369% Weapon Attack Damage.
The skill gains Demolisher Charge once every 3s.
+215% additional Hit Damage when the skill consumes Demolisher Charge
Converts 100% of the skill's Physical Damage to Fire Damage
The pummel and explosion caused by the skill can hit the same enemy.
The skill's Shotgun Effect falloff coefficient is 70%.
Converts 100% of the skill's Physical Damage to Fire Damage
Projectile Quantity of this skill +2
+215% additional Hit Damage when the skill consumes Demolisher Charge
Chromatic Shot
Casts this skill and fires 3 auto-tracing shots, dealing 592-1100 Spell Damage.
10% chance for enemies to explode once when defeated by this skill, dealing True Damage equal to 25% of their Max Life.
Each time this skill is cast, forcibly converts all damage dealt by the next skill to a randomly selected type of Elemental Damage.
Shots fired by this skill can hit the same enemy.
Chromatic Shot:
Deals 592-1100 Spell Damage
This skill fires 1 Projectile in its base state.
Projectile Quantity of this skill +2
When this skill is cast, selects a random Elemental type, forcibly converting the damage of the next use of this skill to that type
10% chance for enemies to explode when defeated by this skill, dealing True Damage equal to 25% of their Max Life to enemies within a 5 m radius
The Projectiles shot by this skill can hit the same enemy.
This skill's Shotgun Effect falloff coefficient is 70%
Resurrection Warcry
Casts the skill and lets out a Warcry: Weakens nearby enemies. For each enemy affected, -2% additional damage taken, up to -60% additional damage taken, for 3s.
Casts the skill and gains restoration: Restores 40 Life within 4s. This effect is not affected by Warcry Effects.
Casts the skill and lets out a Warcry:
Weakens Nearby enemies.
-2% additional damage taken by you for each enemy affected, stacking up to 8 times
Lasts 3s.
Casts the skill and gains restoration: Restores 40 Life within 4s.
The effect is not affected by Warcry effects.
Restores 40 Life in 4 s (Lv1:40) (Lv2:72) (Lv3:108) (Lv4:144) (Lv5:188) (Lv6:248) (Lv7:296) (Lv8:344) (Lv9:396) (Lv10:452) (Lv11:508) (Lv12:556) (Lv13:616) (Lv14:684) (Lv15:756) (Lv16:860) (Lv17:924) (Lv18:1000) (Lv19:1080) (Lv20:1160) (Lv21:1188) (Lv22:1220) (Lv23:1256) (Lv24:1288) (Lv25:1320) (Lv26:1352) (Lv27:1404) (Lv28:1464) (Lv29:1528) (Lv30:1592) (Lv31:1656) (Lv32:1696) (Lv33:1740) (Lv34:1784) (Lv35:1828) (Lv36:1872) (Lv37:1916) (Lv38:1960) (Lv39:2008) (Lv40:2052)
Whirlwind
When channeling the skill, continuously deals 83% Weapon Attack Damage to enemies within a certain area around the caster.
At max channeled stacks, loses all channeled stacks with a chance to launch a Steep Strike, dealing 138% Weapon Attack Damage to enemies in a large area. This chance is equal to the Steep Strike chance.
Movement is not restricted when the skill is being channeled.
Sweep Slash:
Deals 83% Weapon Attack Damage.
Steep Strike:
Deals 138% Weapon Attack Damage.
+100% additional Attack Speed for this skill
This skill +20% Steep Strike chance.
-30% Movement Speed while channeling this skill
Movement is not restricted when the skill is being channeled.
Max channeled stacks: 5
At max channeled stacks, there's a chance to deal damage to enemies in a large area. The chance is equal to the skill's Steep Strike chance.
Focused Slash
Sweep Slashes the fan-shaped area in front, dealing 154% Weapon Attack Damage on hit and gaining Fervor.
This skill is affected by Steep Strike chance and may be cast in Steep Strike form. When it launches a Steep Strike, it attacks the square area in front, dealing 308% Weapon Attack Damage on hit. Fervor Rating increases the skill's additional damage.
Sweep Slash:
Deals 154% Weapon Attack Damage.
Steep Strike:
Deals 308% Weapon Attack Damage.
Gains Fervor when this skill hits
0.4% additional damage for this skill for every 1 Fervor Rating. This skill is affected by Fervor Effect
This skill +20% Steep Strike chance.
Stoneskin
Casts the skill and gains defensive effect: Absorbs Absorb 70% damage taken. Cannot absorb Damage Over Time.
1500 damaged absorbed of damage taken, up to Absorb 70% damage taken. Cannot absorb Damage Over Time.
1500 damaged absorbed. Lasts 6s.
Casts the skill and gains defensive effect: Absorbs Absorb 70% damage taken. Cannot absorb Damage Over Time.
1500 damaged absorbed of damage taken.
Absorbs up to Absorb 70% damage taken. Cannot absorb Damage Over Time.
1500 damaged absorbed damage.
Lasts 6s.
Thundercloud
When channeling the skill, generates a Thundercloud above the caster, which will continuously attacking enemies within a certain area at intervals with each time dealing 36-682 Spell Lightning Damage.
Channeled stacks will increase the Duration and Attack Frequency of Thundercloud.
Thundercloud:
Deals 36-682 SpellLightning Damage.
Channels up to 5 stacks.
Thundercloud Duration +2.5s for every stack.
Thundercloud attacks up to 3 targets.
+1 Jumps for the skill
Thundercloud's Attack Frequency reaches max at 9 channeled stacks.
Blink
Casts the skill and moves in the target direction.
The skill and some Mobility Skills share the same cooldown.
+5% additional Cooldown Recovery Speed for this skill (Lv1:5) (Lv21:25) (Lv41:45)
Bombard
Casts the skill and tosses 4 cannon shell(s) that auto-aim random enemies forward in a row. Each cannon shell will explode upon contacting its target, dealing 41% Weapon Attack Damage
All of the skill's Physical Damage will be converted to Fire Damage
Cannon Shell:
Deals 41% Weapon Attack Damage.
Fires 4 Projectile(s) in a row.
The skill's Projectiles' effect after splitting -50% additional damage
Explosion:
Deals 41% Weapon Attack Damage.
Converts 100% of the skill's Physical Damage to Fire Damage
Converts 100% of the skill's Physical Damage to Fire Damage
The skill's Projectiles' effect after splitting -50% additional damage
Shadow Shot
Casts the skill and fires 1 Shadow Shot that detonates on hit forward, dealing 564-846 Spell Erosion Damage.
The Shadow Shot can move the existing Shadow Swamp.
Shadow Shot:
Deals 564-846 Spell Erosion Damage.
The skill fires 1 Projectile in its base state.
Explosion:
Deals 564-846 Spell Erosion Damage.
The skill moves an existing Shadow Swamp to the target's location on hit. The Interval of this effect is 0.5s
Shadow Swamp
Casts the skill and generates Erosion Explosion at the target spot, dealing 420-420 Spell Erosion Damage to enemies within a certain area.
The Erosion Explosion will leave a Swamp Terra afterwards, dealing 557 Persistent Erosion Damage to enemies in it. The Swamp Terra lasts 3s.
The Swamp Terra can be moved by Shadows. After that, there will be another Erosion Explosion and the duration will be refreshed.
Explosion:
Deals 420-420 Spell Erosion Damage.
Swamp Terra:
Swamp Terra lasts for 3s
Deals 557 Persistent Erosion Damage every second for 2s
The skill can only generate 1 Terra
Enemies on a Swamp Terra are Weakened
On hit, Shadow Shot moves the existing Swamp Terra to the location of the hit and causes another explosion
Each movement grants +10% additional Skill Area for the Swamp Terra
Stacks up to 1 time(s)
For every stack of Terra Charge consumed, the Swamp Terra gains an additional effect every time it moves: +26% additional Damage Over Time (does not apply to Ailment Damage)
Damage Over Time statuses inflicted by the skill can't be spread (excludes Ailments)
For every +1 Max Terra Quantity, the number of times this effect can be stacked +2
Marked Rain of Arrows
Casts the skill and fires a Marked Arrow, dealing 35% Weapon Attack Damage on hit. The Marked Arrow has a chance to Mark the enemy.
When the Marked Arrow marks the enemy or hits a Marked enemy, channels down 5 Explosive Arrows around the enemy with each Explosive Arrow dealing 162% Weapon Attack Damage.
Marked Arrow:
Deals 35% Weapon Attack Damage.
The skill fires 1 Projectile in its base state.
+100% chance for the Marked Arrows to Mark the enemy on hit
The Projectile is not affected by Projectile Quantity bonuses.
Projectiles fired by this skill cannot Jump or Penetrate
Explosive Arrow:
Deals 162% Weapon Attack Damage.
The skill fires 1 Projectile in its base state.
Projectile Quantity of this skill +4
Converts 100% of the skill's Physical Damage to Fire Damage
The Explosive Arrows fired by the skill can hit the same enemy.
The skill's Shotgun Effect falloff coefficient is 70%.
+100% chance for the Marked Arrows to Mark the enemy on hit
Projectile Quantity of this skill +4
Converts 100% of the skill's Physical Damage to Fire Damage
Projectiles from this skill cannot Jump
Projectiles from this skill cannot Penetrate
Bull's Rage
Casts the skill and gains Euphoria: Melee skills deal 17.5% additional damage for 6s.
All Mana costs of the skill will be converted to Life costs.
Casts the skill and gains Euphoria:
+27% additional Melee Skill Damage while the skill lasts
Lasts 6s.
This skill costs Life instead of Mana
Shadow Dash
Casts the skill and moves in the target direction, inflicting 1 stack(s) of Slow on enemies at the starting point, the target location, and in proximity to the path.
The skill and some Mobility Skills share the same cooldown.
Casts the skill and moves in the target direction, inflicting 1 stack(s) of Slow on enemies at the starting point, the target location, and in proximity to the path.
This skill inflicts 1 stack(s) of Slow on enemies at the starting point, the target location, and in proximity to the path (Lv1:1) (Lv4:1) (Lv5:2) (Lv7:2) (Lv8:3) (Lv11:3) (Lv12:4) (Lv15:4) (Lv16:5)
Frost Shield
Casts the skill and gains the defensive effect: Additionally -13.8% Physical Damage and Fire Damage taken for 5s.
While the skill lasts, generates three Frost Shields around the caster, dealing 80-121 Spell Cold Damage.
Casts the skill and gains defensive effect:
-29% additional Physical Damage taken while the skill lasts
-29% additional Fire Damage taken while the skill lasts
Lasts 5s.
Frost Shield:

Casts the skill and pummels the area in front, causing fissure and dealing 227% Weapon Attack Damage on hit.
When the skill consumes Demolisher Charge, 10% additional Skill Area and expands the fissure. When the fissure expands to the maximum, deals 1135% Weapon Attack Damage again.
Fission:
Deals 227% Weapon Attack Damage.
Fissure Secondary Damage:
Deals 1135% Weapon Attack Damage
This skill gains 1 Demolisher Charge every 3s.
This skill's Demolisher Charge Restoration Speed bonuses are also applied to the speed at which the fissure spreads.
+10% additional Skill Area when the skill consumes Demolisher Charge
Focused Shot
Casts the skill and fires 1 Projectile forward, dealing 315% Weapon Attack Damage on hit and gaining Fervor and 5 Fervor Rating.
While Fervor is active, the skill 2 Projectile Penetration(s). For every 10 Fervor Rating, the skill deals more damage based on the distance between the character and the enemy, up to 4% additional damage to a distant enemy.
Focused Shot:
Deals 315% Weapon Attack Damage.
The skill fires 1 Projectile in its base state.
Gains Fervor when this skill hits
Gains 5 Fervor Rating when this skill hits
+2 Projectile Penetration(s) for the skill when having Fervor
For every 10 Fervor Rating, the skill deals more damage based on the distance between the character and the enemy, up to +4% additional damage to a distant enemy. This skill is affected by Fervor Effect
Fire Burst
Casts the skill to unleash a burst of fire, dealing 607-1128 Spell Fire Damage to enemies within a certain area.
 
Fire Burst:
Deals 607-1128 SpellFire Damage.
 
Thunderbolt Overload
Casts the skill and throws a Thunderbolt that can jump 2 time(s). The Thunderbolt explodes on hit, dealing 124-207 Spell Physical Damage.
All of the skill's Physical Damage will be converted to Lightning Damage.
Thunderbolt Overload:
Deals 124-207 Spell Physical Damage.
Converts 100% of the skill's Physical Damage to Lightning Damage
This skill's Max Split Quantity is 3
When this skill's Split Quantity exceed 3 , +30% additional damage for each additional Split (this effect does not include Split Quantity provided by the Support Skill)
Fearless Warcry
Casts the skill and lets out a Warcry, Taunting nearby enemies. For every enemy the skill affects, grants 4% additional Slash-Strike Skill Damage and 4% additional Ailment Damage by the Slash-Strike Skill for 3s.
Casts the skill and lets out a Warcry:
Taunts Nearby enemies.
5.9% additional damage dealt by Slash-Strike skills for each enemy affected, stacking up to 8 times
5.9% additional Ailment Damage dealt by Slash-Strike skills per enemy affected, stacking up to 8 times
Lasts 3s.
Raging Warcry
Casts the skill and lets out a Warcry, Taunting nearby enemies. For every enemy the skill affects, increases Demolisher Charge Restoration Speed by 4% and grants 4% additional Demolisher Skill Damage and 4% additional Ailment Damage by the Demolisher Skill for 3.5s.
Casts the skill and lets out a Warcry:
Taunts Nearby enemies.
4.95% additional damage dealt by Demolisher skills for each enemy affected, stacking up to 8 times
4.95% additional Ailment Damage dealt by Demolisher skills per enemy affected, stacking up to 8 times
+4% Demolisher Charge Recovery Speed for each enemy affected, stacking up to 8 times
Lasts 3.5s.
Charging Warcry
Casts this skill and lets out a Warcry. Taunts nearby enemies. Shadow Strike Skills gain 4% additional damage and Ailment Damage for every enemy affected by this skill. While the Warcry lasts, Shadow Strike Skills gain +20% Tracking Area. Lasts 3s.
Casts the skill and lets out a Warcry:
Taunts Nearby enemies.
+20% Tracking Area for Shadow Strike Skills while the skill lasts
+20% Tracking Area for Shadow Strike Skills while the skill lasts
Lasts for 3s
Black Hole
Casts the skill and generates a Black Hole at the target spot, dealing 249 Persistent Erosion Damage to enemies within a certain area every second and periodically launching a Reversed Knockback on enemies inside of it for 4s. Enemies hit will be inflicted 100 Affliction. Cooldown: 1s.
Casts the skill and gains Euphoria:
You deal + 3.5% additional Damage Over Time to enemies in the Black Hole for every 10 Affliction they have for 4s.
Black Hole:
Deals 249-249 Persistent Erosion Damage.
Knockback effect from this skill is reversed
When the skill deals Damage Over Time, it inflicts 100 Affliction on the enemy. Effect Cooldown: 1 s
The Black Hole knocks back enemies inside of it every 0.5s.
Lasts 4s.
Casts the skill and gains Euphoria:
You deal + 3.5% additional Damage Over Time to enemies in the Black Hole for every 10 Affliction they have for 4s.

Converts 100% of Physical Damage dealt by the Minions summoned by this skill to Lightning Damage

Overpower
Casts the skill and pummels the ground in front, dealing Attack Physical Damage equal to 49% Base Damage on hit.
Overpower:
Deals Attack Physical Damage equal to 49% Base Damage
Onslaught Punch
Casts the skill and dashes to the target enemy. Stops before the enemy and attacks the square area in front, dealing Attack Physical Damage equal to 75% Base Damage.
Onslaught Punch:
Deals Attack Physical Damage equal to 75% Base Damage
Aimed Shot
Casts the skill and fires 1 Projectile forward, dealing Attack Physical Damage equal to 61% Base Damage. The Projectile Penetrates 2 times.
Aimed Shot:
Deals Attack Physical Damage equal to 61% Base Damage

Blazing Dance
Casts the skill to attack in a fan-shaped area in front, dealing Spell Fire Damage equal to 110% of Base Damage.
Blazing Dance:
Deals Spell Fire Damage equal to 110% of Base Damage
Blazing Spin
Casts the skill and gains Euphoria: 435% Critical Strike Rating for 6s.
Generates a Fire Domain within a certain area around the caster while the buff is active, dealing Persistent Fire Damage equal to 136% of Base Damage every second to enemies within it
Casts the skill and gains Euphoria:
+435% Critical Strike Rating while the skill lasts
Lasts 6s.
When at Stage 4 or higher, while the skill lasts, hitting an enemy affected by this skill grants a stack of buff. Interval: 0.01s.
Each stack of the buff +14% Critical Strike Damage for 2 s, stacking up to 15 time(s)
Blazing Spin:
Deals Persistent Fire Damage equal to 136% Base Damage every second
Blazing Incineration
Casts the skill to attack in a circular area in front, dealing Spell Fire Damage equal to 278% of Base Damage. This skill deals additional Damage if a Critical Strike of it was dealt recently.
Blazing Incineration:
Deals Spell Fire Damage equal to 278% of Base Damage.
#skillstone, 1894, affix#
+10% additional Damage if the skill has dealt a Critical Strike recently
When at Stage 3 or higher, this skill grants 1 stack of buff on Critical Strike. Interval: 0.01s.
+15% Skill Area for 2 s for every stack of buff, stacking up to 15 time(s)
When at Stage 3 or higher, +30% additional damage for this skill
Molten Rising
Casts the skill forward and unleashes four pillars of flame, dealing Spell Fire Damage equal to 637% of Base Damage.
Rising Molten:
Deals 637% of Base Damage as Spell Fire Damage.

Casts the skill to attack in a fan-shaped area in front, dealing Spell Cold Damage equal to 110% of Base Damage.

Frost Release
Casts this skill and spreads Freezing Air within a certain area around you, dealing Spell Cold Damage equal to 72% Base Damage.
Casts this skill and gains Euphoria: The next 5 other skill(s) deal 81% additional damage. After casting another skill, this bonus becomes -15% for 6s, stacking up to 5 time(s). Multiple stacks of the skill effect multiply.
While this skill lasts, you gain 20 Max Frostbite Rating
Casts the skill and gains Euphoria:
The next 5 use(s) of other non-Channeled Skills deal +81% additional Hit Damage while the skill lasts. -15% to this damage bonus after casting another skill
Lasts 6s.
Stacks up to 5 time(s)
Multiple stacks of the skill effect multiply.
Frost Release:
Deals Spell Cold Damage equal to 72% of Base Damage
+20 Max Frostbite Rating while this skill lasts
When at Stage 4 or higher, triggers this skill after casting 5 other skills

Thunderlight Arrow
Casts the skill and fires a Projectile forward, dealing Attack Physical Damage equal to 189% of Base Damage. The Projectile always Penetrates and tracks the enemy. Projectile Quantity bonuses do not increase the skill's Projectile Quantity but grant additional Damage and enlarge Projectiles.
Thunderlight Arrow:
Deals Attack Physical Damage equal to 189% of Base Damage.
When at Stage 3 or higher, +1 Base Projectile Quantity for this skill
+5% additional Damage for every +1 Projectile Quantity of this skill
Projectiles from this skill always Penetrate
The Projectiles fired by this skill can hit the same enemy.
The Shotgun Effect falloff coefficient of this skill is 70%.
The Projectile Quantity of this skill is not affected by Projectile Quantity bonuses.

Casts the skill and gains Euphoria: 35% additional Attack Speed. The buff lasts 6s.
Casts the skill and gains Euphoria:
+35% additional Attack Speed while the skill lasts

Lightning Surge
Casts the skill and fires a lightning bolt forward. The lightning bolt does not deal damage. As the lightning bolt travels, it unleashes a Chain of Lightning every 0.25s at up to 8 Nearby enemies, dealing 301% Base Damage as Attack Physical damage. Projectile Quantity bonuses do not increase the skill's Projectile Quantity but increase the number of enemies targeted by Chain of Lightning.
Lightning bolts always Penetrate.
Lightning Bolt:
Unleashes a Chain of Lightning every 0.25s at up to 8 Nearby enemies.
Projectile Quantity bonuses increase the number of enemies targeted by Chain of Lightning.
Projectile Quantity does not increase.
Projectiles from this skill always Penetrate
This skill's Projectile Speed bonus is fixed at 0
Chain of Lightning:
Deals Attack Physical Damage equal to 301% of Base Damage
High Energy Beam
Casts the skill and fires 1 Beam to attack the square area in front, dealing Spell Physical Damage equal to 46% of Base Damage on hit.
High Energy Beam:
Deals Spell Physical Damage equal to 46% Base Damage.
The skill fires 1 beam in its base state.
100% of the bonuses and additional bonuses for the skill's Beam Length is also applied to the skill's Skill Area
Beams fired by the skill are not affected by beam length bonuses.
The beams fired by the skill can hit the same enemy.
The skill's Shotgun Effect falloff coefficient is 70%.
Destructive Light Cannon
Casts the skill and fires a Beam to the target spot, causing an explosion there and dealing Spell Physical damage equal to 207% Base Damage.
Destructive Light Cannon:
Deals Spell Physical Damage equal to 207% Base Damage.

100% of the bonuses and additional bonuses for the skill's Beam Length is also applied to the skill's Skill Area
For every 1 Beam(s), this skill +30% additional damage
Whirlwind Blade
Casts the skill and fires 1 Projectile that always Penetrates in the target direction, dealing 308-513 Spell Physical Damage. The Projectile deals damage once every 0.25s and stops on the spot after traveling a fixed distance or hitting an Elite.
After casting this skill, casting it again will recall the Projectile that has been fired, but that cast is not deemed to have been cast again.
Projectiles can only be fired again after all previous Projectiles have been recalled. Projectiles will be automatically recalled after 5s. If a Projectile is more than 40m away from the character, the Projectile will be forcibly removed and won't need to be recalled.
The Projectiles fired by this skill can hit the same enemy.
Whirlwind Blade:
Deals 308-513 Spell Physical Damage.
This skill fires 1 Projectile in its base state.
It deals damage once every 0.25s.
Projectiles from this skill always Penetrate

Projectiles will be automatically recovered after 5 s.
The Projectiles shot by the skill can hit the same enemy.
The skill's Shotgun Effect falloff coefficient is 75%.
Lightning Beam
When casting the skill, fires 1 Lightning Beam forward at enemies within the Beam Area in front, dealing 25-480 Spell Lightning Damage on hit.
Every 2 time(s) this skill is cast, generates a Thunderbolt around the caster that follows the caster and automatically casts this skill at enemies within a certain area.
The Thunderbolt lasts for 6s. Up to 3 Thunderbolt(s) can be generated.
Lightning Beam:
Deals 25-480 Spell Lightning Damage
Every 2 time(s) this skill is cast, generates a Thunderbolt around the caster that follows the caster
This skill generates up to 3 Thunderbolt(s)
The Thunderbolts last for 6s
For every +1 Beam(s), increases this skill's Thunderbolt generation upper limit by +1
The number of Beams generated by this skill is not affected by Quantity bonuses
The Beams fired by this skill are not affected by Beam Length bonuses
100% of the bonuses and additional bonuses for the skill's Beam Length is also applied to the skill's Skill Area
No more Thunderbolts will be generated after reaching the upper limit.
For every +1 Beam(s), increases this skill's Thunderbolt generation upper limit by +1
100% of the bonuses and additional bonuses for the skill's Beam Length is also applied to the skill's Skill Area
Speed Phantom
Casts the skill and moves in the target direction, leaving behind a Remnant before and after moving, and inflicting Reversed Knockback on nearby enemies within a certain distance.
The Remnant explodes after 0.65s, dealing damage to enemies once. Gains 1 stack of Euphoria for each enemy hit:
For every 1 stack(s) of Euphoria, 2.5% additional Spell Damage, up to 8 stacks, lasting for 1.2s.
Remnant:
Remnant lasts 0.65s.
You can have up to 2 Remnant(s).
Remnant explosions deal 542-904 Spell Physical Damage on hit.
Gains 1 stack of Euphoria for each enemy hit by a Remnant explosion.
Euphoria:
For every 1 stack(s) of Euphoria, 2.5% additional Spell Damage, up to 8 stacks, lasting for 1.2s
Gains 1 stack of buff for each enemy hit with this skill, stacking up to 8 times
Knockback effect from this skill is reversed

Casts the skill and randomly places 1 Sentries that last for 6s within a certain area around the caster. Sentries grant Euphoria to Nearby allies within 4m:
Projectile Quantity is fixed at 1
+30% additional Projectile Damage
+20% Attack Speed for Attack Projectile Skills
+20% Cast Speed for Spell Projectile Skills

Sentry lasts 6s.
Skill's max base Sentry quantity is 1

Projectile Quantity is fixed at 1

+20% Cast Speed for Spell Projectile Skills
Nourishment of Life
Casts the skill and creates an area that follows the caster for 6s.
Casts the skill and gains Euphoria: Spirit Magi within the area have 60 initial Growth.
Casts the skill and creates an area that follows the caster for 6s.
Casts the skill and gains Euphoria:

Dazzling Bloom
Casts the skill and teleports all Spirit Magi to the designated location and makes them switch targets to the enemy with the highest Rarity within 5m.
Casts the skill and gains Euphoria: Spirit Magi deal up to 22% additional damage for 3s based on the enemy's Rarity.
Casts the skill and gains Euphoria:
While the skill lasts, Spirit Magi deal higher damage to rarer enemies, up to 22 additional damage
Lasts for 3s
Star Stalker
Casts the skill and fires 1 Projectile forward. The Projectile will generate an area that follows itself. While inside this area, the character gains Euphoria: 22.5% additional Damage Over Time.
The Projectile will continuously track Elites and attach itself to the tracked target upon reaching it. After this unit is defeated, the Projectile will track another unit.
The Projectile flies with a 100% of the Character's Movement Speed, and lasts for 4s.
Star Stalker:
While inside the area, the character gains Euphoria:
+32% additional Damage Over Time
The Flying Speed of the Projectile is 100% of the character's Movement Speed
The Projectile lasts for 4s
The Projectiles launched by this skill are not affected by Penetrate, Jump, or Return effects
Harmonious Field
At the end of the skill channeling, generates an area that follows the caster. Sentries within this area gain Euphoria: 8.2% additional damage for 6s. +33% additional Empower Effect for this skill for every 1 channeled stack.
If the channeling of this skill stops at max channeled stacks, +3s duration for Sentries in this area.
Movement is not restricted when the skill is being channeled.
At the end of the skill channeling, generates an area that follows the caster. Sentries within this area gain Euphoria:

+33% additional Empower Effect for this skill for every 1 channeled stack

Movement is not restricted when the skill is being channeled.
Shackles of Malice
Casts the skill and fires a Malice Chain, dealing 667-667 Spell Erosion Damage. The chain Jumps 2 time(s).
Upon hitting a Cursed enemy, the chain causes an explosion and deals 667-667 Spell Erosion Damage to enemies within a certain area, then it removes all Curse Effects from the Cursed enemy.
The explosion deals more damage to enemies that are inflicted with more Curse Effects.
Malice Chain:
Deals 667-667 Spell Erosion Damage
Explosion:
Deals 667-667 Spell Erosion Damage
The explosion removes all Curse Effects from the enemy hit by the chain
For every 1 Curse Effect inflicted on the enemy hit by the chain, the explosion 25% additional Hit Damage (multiplies)

The Projectiles fired by this skill cannot return.
Blitz Strike
Casts this skill, teleports to the target enemy, and fires 3 Projectiles that always Penetrate, dealing Attack Fire Damage equal to 75% of Base Damage on hit and additionally increases the damage of the next Burst Hammer.
Blitz Strike:
Deals Attack Fire Damage equal to 75% of Base Damage
+100% additional damage for the next Burst Hammer cast after casting this skill
Burst Hammer
Casts this skill and generates 3 consecutive waves of explosions in a circular area in front, dealing Attack Fire Damage equal to 64% of Base Damage on hit. If you have at least 1 stack of Tenacity Blessing, this skill consumes 1 stack of Tenacity Blessing to deal additional damage.
Burst Hammer:
Deals Attack Fire Damage equal to 64% of Base Damage
If the summoner has Tenacity Blessing stacks when casting this skill, consumes 1 stack of Tenacity Blessing to make this cast deal +30% additional damage
The pummel and explosion caused by this skill can hit the same enemy.
This skill's Shotgun Effect falloff coefficient is 64%
Firebomb
Casts this skill and summons a bomb-throwing Drone to attack many circular areas, dealing Spell Fire Damage equal to 73% of Base Damage on hit.
Firebomb:
Deals Spell Fire Damage equal to 73% of Base Damage
Pyromania
Casts this skill to generate a Flame Terra in a square area in front, dealing Persistent Fire Damage equal to 68% of Base Damage to enemies inside it.
Pyromania:
Deals Persistent Fire Damage equal to 68% of Base Damage
Flickering Shadow
Casts this skill, teleports to the target enemy, and attacks in a circular area, dealing Attack Physical Damage equal to 68% of Base Damage on hit. Additionally increases this skill's damage dealt to Wilted enemies but consumes their Wilt stacks.
Flickering Shadow:
Deals Attack Physical Damage equal to 68% of Base Damage
Removes 1 stack of Wilt and +75% additional damage for this skill when hitting a Wilted enemy
This skill cannot inflict Wilt
Sin of the Fallen
Casts this skill and attacks many circular areas after a brief delay, dealing Attack Physical Damage equal to 72% of Base Damage and inflicting Wilt on hit.
Sin of the Fallen:
Deals Attack Physical Damage equal to 72% of Base Damage
+100% Wilt Chance for this skill and adds 5 - 5 Base Wilt Damage
Blade of Glory
Casts this skill to attack in a fan-shaped area in front, dealing Attack Physical Damage equal to 37% of Base Damage on hit.
Blade of Glory:
Deals Attack Physical Damage equal to 37% of Base Damage
High Court Covenant
Casts this skill and generates many Phantoms, then charges forward after a brief delay, dealing Attack Physical Damage equal to 104% of Base Damage to enemies in the path. Also gains a Critical Strike Rating and Critical Strike Damage buff.
High Court Covenant:
Deals Attack Physical Damage equal to 104% of Base Damage
Gains a buff when casting this skill: +300 Critical Strike Rating and +75% Critical Strike Damage for 4 s
Ravaging Slash
Casts this skill to attack in a square area in front, dealing Attack Physical Damage equal to 74% of Base Damage on hit.
Ravaging Slash:
Deals Attack Physical Damage equal to 74% of Base Damage
Auric Shot
Casts this skill and consecutively fires 3 Projectile(s) forward, each dealing Attack Physical Damage equal to 41% of Base Damage on hit.
Auric Shot:
Deals Attack Physical Damage equal to 41% of Base Damage
Gravelshot
Casts this skill and hurls a huge rock Projectile forward that explodes upon landing, dealing Attack Physical Damage equal to 38% of Base Damage.
Gravelshot:
Deals Attack Physical Damage equal to 38% of Base Damage
The skill's Projectiles' effect after splitting -50% additional damage
Divine Judgment
Casts this skill and attacks many circular areas nearby the target after a brief delay, dealing Spell Lightning Damage equal to 104% of Base Damage on hit, gaining Lucky Damage, and additionally increasing Max Damage.
Divine Judgment:
Deals Spell Lightning Damage equal to 104% of Base Damage
Gains a buff when casting this skill: Lucky Damage and +60% additional Max Damage for 4 s
Javelin of Judgment
Casts this skill and fires 1 Javelin Projectile that always Penetrates, dealing Spell Lightning Damage equal to 62% of Base Damage. The Projectiles fired by this skill are not affected by Projectile Quantity bonuses.
Javelin of Judgment:
Deals Spell Lightning Damage equal to 62% of Base Damage
Spikeburst
Casts this skill and fires 5 Projectile(s) at the target, dealing Attack Physical Damage equal to 75% of Base Damage on hit.
Spikeburst:
Deals Attack Physical Damage equal to 75% of Base Damage
Projectiles from this skill always Penetrate
The Projectiles fired by the skill are not affected by Projectile Quantity bonuses.
The Projectiles fired by this skill can hit the same enemy.
This skill's Shotgun Effect falloff coefficient is 64%
Tailsweep
Casts this skill to attack enemies in a fan-shaped area in front, knocking them back and dealing Attack Physical Damage equal to 73% of Base Damage.
Tailsweep:
Deals Attack Physical Damage equal to 73% of Base Damage
Impaling Thrust
Casts this skill and charges forward to attack in a fan-shaped area in front, dealing Attack Physical Damage equal to 111% of Base Damage on hit. Also grants a buff that increases Skill Area and Area Damage.
Impaling Thrust:
Deals Attack Physical Damage equal to 111% of Base Damage
Gains a buff when casting this skill: +60% Skill Area and +40% additional Area Damage for 4 s
Twinstrike
Casts this skill to attack in a fan-shaped area in front twice, dealing Attack Physical Damage equal to 23% of Base Damage each time.
Twinstrike:
Deals Attack Physical Damage equal to 23% of Base Damage
Undercurrent
Casts the skill and fires 1 Projectile forward, dealing Attack Physical Damage equal to 61% Base Damage. The Projectile Penetrates 2 times.
Aimed Shot:
Deals Attack Physical Damage equal to 61% Base Damage
+2 Penetration for this skill (Lv1:2)
Resistance Dew
Casts this skill and gains an Elixir Effect: 12.2% Elemental and Erosion Resistance. Lasts for 3s.
Defeating enemies can increase the Charging Progress of this skill. At 15 Charging Progress, gains 1 Charge. Defeating a Normal/Magic/Rare/Boss enemy grants 1/3/6/100 Charging Progress.
Casts this skill and gains an Elixir Effect:
+16% Elemental and Erosion Resistance
Lasts for 3s

+4500 Armor

+4500 Evasion

+6% Max Elemental Resistance

Defeating enemies can increase the Charging Progress of this skill. At 15 Charging Progress, gains 1 Charge. Defeating a Normal/Magic/Rare/Boss enemy grants 1/3/6/100 Charging Progress.

Casts this skill and gains an Elixir Effect: Grants a Shield equal to 5.5% of Max Life, but half of damage taken bypasses Energy Shield. Lasts for 3s.
Defeating enemies can increase the Charging Progress of this skill. At 15 Charging Progress, gains 1 Charge. Defeating a Normal/Magic/Rare/Boss enemy grants 1/3/6/100 Charging Progress.
Casts this skill and gains an Elixir Effect:
Adds 15% of Max Life to Energy Shield
Half of the damage taken bypasses Energy Shield
Lasts for 3s
Defeating enemies can increase the Charging Progress of this skill. At 15 Charging Progress, gains 1 Charge. Defeating a Normal/Magic/Rare/Boss enemy grants 1/3/6/100 Charging Progress.
Scorpion Stinger Distillate
Casts this skill and gains an Elixir Effect: 1 Projectile Quantity, 10.5% Skill Area, and 10.5% Movement Speed for 3s.
Defeating enemies can increase the Charging Progress of this skill. At 15 Charging Progress, gains 1 Charge. Defeating a Normal/Magic/Rare/Boss enemy grants 1/3/6/100 Charging Progress.
Casts this skill and gains an Elixir Effect:
Projectile Quantity +1
+20% Skill Area
+20% Movement Speed, up to +125%
Lasts for 3s
Defeating enemies can increase the Charging Progress of this skill. At 15 Charging Progress, gains 1 Charge. Defeating a Normal/Magic/Rare/Boss enemy grants 1/3/6/100 Charging Progress.
Putrid Toad Distillate
Casts this skill and gains an Elixir Effect: Has Blur. While Blur is active, 10.5% Defense and -21% Curse Effect Received. Lasts for 3s.
Defeating enemies can increase the Charging Progress of this skill. At 15 Charging Progress, gains 1 Charge. Defeating a Normal/Magic/Rare/Boss enemy grants 1/3/6/100 Charging Progress.
Casts this skill and gains an Elixir Effect:
Has Blur
While Blur is active, +20% Defense
-40% Cursed Effect while Blur is active
Lasts for 3s
Defeating enemies can increase the Charging Progress of this skill. At 15 Charging Progress, gains 1 Charge. Defeating a Normal/Magic/Rare/Boss enemy grants 1/3/6/100 Charging Progress.
Saltpeter Mushroom Distillate
Casts this skill and gains an Elixir Effect: 8.2% of damage taken is transferred to a random Minion, and 25% chance for enemies to explode when defeated by Minions' Attacks or Spells, dealing True Damage equal to 250% of their Max Life to enemies within a 6m radius. Lasts for 3s.
Defeating enemies can increase the Charging Progress of this skill. At 15 Charging Progress, gains 1 Charge. Defeating a Normal/Magic/Rare/Boss enemy grants 1/3/6/100 Charging Progress.
Casts this skill and gains an Elixir Effect:
25% chance for enemies to explode when defeated by Minions' Attacks or Spells, dealing True Damage equal to 6 of their Max Life to enemies within a 250% m radius (not affected by the effects of Elixir Skills)
12% of damage taken is transferred to a random Minion
Lasts for 3s
Defeating enemies can increase the Charging Progress of this skill. At 15 Charging Progress, gains 1 Charge. Defeating a Normal/Magic/Rare/Boss enemy grants 1/3/6/100 Charging Progress.
Fire Lizard Distillate
Casts this skill and gains an Elixir Effect: Converts 11.2% of Physical Damage taken to Fire Damage. Replaces inflicted Ignite with Scorch. Lasts for 3s.
Defeating enemies can increase the Charging Progress of this skill. At 15 Charging Progress, gains 1 Charge. Defeating a Normal/Magic/Rare/Boss enemy grants 1/3/6/100 Charging Progress.

Converts 15% of Physical Damage taken to Fire Damage
The Ignite inflicted is replaced with Scorch

Casts this skill and gains an Elixir Effect: Converts 11.2% of Physical Damage taken to Cold Damage. Energy Shield Charge started recently cannot be interrupted by damage. 10% Energy Shield Charge Speed. Lasts for 3s.
Defeating enemies can increase the Charging Progress of this skill. At 15 Charging Progress, gains 1 Charge. Defeating a Normal/Magic/Rare/Boss enemy grants 1/3/6/100 Charging Progress.

Converts 15% of Physical Damage taken to Cold Damage

Defeating enemies can increase the Charging Progress of this skill. At 15 Charging Progress, gains 1 Charge. Defeating a Normal/Magic/Rare/Boss enemy grants 1/3/6/100 Charging Progress.

Ominous
Casts this skill and Curses enemies within the target area.
Cursed enemies can gain Ill Omen
+21% Skill Area for the skill (Lv1:21) (Lv21:41) (Lv41:61)
+21% additional duration for this skill (Lv1:21) (Lv21:41) (Lv41:61)
Lasts for 5s
Skill Level
The Base Damage and affix effects of skills increase with the skill level. Defeat enemies to gain Skill XP, which can be used to upgrade skills to Lv.20.
The Base Damage and affix effects of skills increase with the skill level. Defeat enemies to gain Skill XP, which can be used to upgrade skills to Lv.20.
Some special effects, such as affixes or drop skills also increase the skill level. This makes it possible for the actual level of skills to exceed Lv.20.
After the skill exceeds Lv. 20, its Base Damage and the Base Damage of its Minions will no longer change. However, for every level beyond this level, this skill and its Minions will gain additional damage. At Lv. 21 - 30, each level +10%% additional damage (multiplies). At Lv. 31 or higher, each level +8%% additional damage (multiplies).
For example: when the current level of a skill is 21 and exceeds Lv.20 by 1 level, the skill will deal +10%% additional damage.
The Base Damage of the following skills will not increase with their skill level:
Burst of Anger
Skill - Help
About Skill Slots:
1. Skill slots require energy to unlock, including active and passive unlocking.
2. The first slot of each skill tab passively unlocks when energy reaches the cap.
3. Players need to allocate energy to unlock other skill slots.
4. Energy can be gained by leveling up characters and equipping gear (excluding trinkets).

About Skills:
1. Skills are divided into Active Skills, Support Skills, Passive Skills and Triggered Skills.
2. Active and Passive Skills can be linked to Support Skills.
3. Triggered Skills can be linked to Active and Support Skills.
4. Available Support Skills that can be linked are identified by their skill tags.
5. Only one skill will be active when identical skills are equipped.
6. The availability of Active Skills depends on the weapons equipped by characters.
